# octopusdeploy_subscription (Resource)

This resource manages event notification subscriptions in Octopus Deploy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Webhook subscription – notifies on machine modification events
resource "octopusdeploy_subscription" "machine_changes" {
  name = "Machine Changes"

  event_notification_subscription = {
    webhook_uri     = "https://hooks.example.com/octopus"
    webhook_timeout = "00:00:10"

    filter = {
      event_categories = ["Modified"]
      document_types   = ["Machines"]
    }
  }
}

# Email subscription – high-priority digest for deployment failures
resource "octopusdeploy_subscription" "deployment_failures" {
  name = "Deployment Failures"

  event_notification_subscription = {
    email_frequency_period = "00:30:00"
    email_priority         = "High"

    filter = {
      event_categories = ["DeploymentFailed"]
    }
  }
}

# Webhook with a custom auth header and disabled initially
resource "octopusdeploy_subscription" "all_events_paused" {
  name        = "All Events (paused)"
  is_disabled = true

  event_notification_subscription = {
    webhook_uri         = "https://hooks.example.com/all"
    webhook_header_key  = "Authorization"
    webhook_header_value = "Bearer my-secret-token"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `event_notification_subscription` (Attributes) Event notification configuration for this subscription. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--event_notification_subscription))
- `name` (String) The name of this resource.

### Optional

- `is_disabled` (Boolean) Whether this subscription is disabled.
- `space_id` (String) The space ID associated with this subscription.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique ID for this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--event_notification_subscription"></a>
### Nested Schema for `event_notification_subscription`

Optional:

- `email_frequency_period` (String) How often to send email digests (e.g. '01:00:00' for hourly).
- `email_priority` (String) Priority of notification emails. Valid values: Normal, High.
- `email_show_dates_in_timezone_id` (String) Timezone ID for dates shown in emails (e.g. 'UTC').
- `email_teams` (List of String) Team IDs to notify via email.
- `filter` (Attributes) Filter criteria to limit which events trigger this subscription. When omitted, all events trigger the subscription. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--event_notification_subscription--filter))
- `webhook_header_key` (String) Custom header key to include in webhook requests.
- `webhook_header_value` (String, Sensitive) Custom header value to include in webhook requests.
- `webhook_teams` (List of String) Team IDs to notify via webhook.
- `webhook_timeout` (String) Timeout for webhook calls (e.g. '00:00:10' for 10 seconds).
- `webhook_uri` (String) URI to send webhook notifications to.

<a id="nestedatt--event_notification_subscription--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `event_notification_subscription.filter`

Optional:

- `document_types` (List of String) Filter by document types (e.g. Machines, Projects, Deployments).
- `environments` (List of String) Filter by environment IDs.
- `event_agents` (List of String) Filter by event agents.
- `event_categories` (List of String) Filter by event categories (e.g. Created, Modified, Deleted).
- `event_groups` (List of String) Filter by event groups.
- `project_groups` (List of String) Filter by project group IDs.
- `projects` (List of String) Filter by project IDs.
- `tags` (List of String) Filter by tenant tags.
- `tenants` (List of String) Filter by tenant IDs.
- `users` (List of String) Filter by user IDs.
